user.title: Connect to E·ON Myline account
user.description: Enter your E·ON Myline email and password. Contracts will be discovered automatically.

mfa_method.title: Choose verification method
mfa_method.description: Your account has two-factor authentication enabled. Choose how you want to receive the verification code.

mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.description: A verification code has been sent via {mfa_type} to {mfa_recipient}. Enter the code to continue.

select_contracts.title: Select contracts
select_contracts.description: We found contracts in your account. Select the contracts you want to monitor.

error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please check your email and password.
error.no_data: Authentication was successful, but no contracts were found for this account.
error.no_contract_selected: Please select at least one contract to continue.
error.mfa_failed: The verification code is incorrect or has expired. Please try again.
error.mfa_resend_failed: Failed to resend the verification code. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This E·ON account is already configured.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.description: Update your credentials and refresh interval. After saving, you will be able to reselect contracts.

mfa_method.title: Choose verification method
mfa_method.description: Your account has two-factor authentication enabled. Choose how you want to receive the verification code.

mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.description: A verification code has been sent via {mfa_type} to {mfa_recipient}. Enter the code to continue.

select_contracts.title: Change monitored contracts
select_contracts.description: Select the contracts you want to monitor. Unselect those you no longer want to track.

error.auth_failed: Authentication failed with the provided credentials.
error.no_data: No contracts were found for this account.
error.no_contract_selected: Please select at least one contract.
error.mfa_failed: The verification code is incorrect or has expired.
error.mfa_resend_failed: Failed to resend the verification code. Please try again.
